accurate.why: States issuance date of March 31, 2022 (vs April 11, 2022 Fed. Reg. publication), which is factually accurate as SAB 121 was issued March 31, 2022; the additional context about cryptoasset guidance is accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: Description of SAB 121 as providing cryptoasset safeguarding guidance is accurate real-world context, not fabricated.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution nullifies SAB 121.

changes_to_existing_law.why: States the rule is nullified, capturing the operative legal change.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions in the resolution.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers disapproval, SAB 121 content, and the GAO opinion; essential provisions captured.

concise.why: Appropriately brief while capturing essential information.

correct_figures.why: Uses issuance date March 31, 2022, which is accurate; Oct. 31, 2023 GAO letter date is correct.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
